LanguageData.PawnDiarySpeakUp.Settings.SpeakUpMissing: SpeakUp is not active. This adapter is loaded inert.
LanguageData.PawnDiarySpeakUp.Settings.CaptureConvers: Gather a delivered SpeakUp reply chain into one pairwise diary event. Individual lines can still contribute to ambient social notes.
LanguageData.PawnDiarySpeakUp.Settings.MinimumReplies: Shorter exchanges remain ambient only. SpeakUp normally schedules up to five replies per conversation.
LanguageData.PawnDiarySpeakUp.Event.ConversationSumma: {0} and {1} carried on one conversation. Delivered reply count: {2}. Sampled lines: {3}
{0} and {1} carried on one conversation. Delivered reply count: {2}.
